reviews.comment:
Ayer miércoles 19/2 quisimos cargar a eso de las 23:30 y menos una todas las islas tenían conos o cartel para indicar que estaban cerradas. Los dos playeros que había cuando nos vieron llegar se metieron en la garita tipo mini contenedor que está frente a los surtidores y cuando nos acercamos con el auto a preguntar.si atendían nos cerraron la puerta de la garita en la cara y no salieron. La estación está abierta las 24 hs pero los empleados no te quieren atender. La YPF de enfrente con 1 playero tenía las cuatro islas llenas y despachando.

(Translated by Google)
Yesterday, Wednesday, February 19th, we tried to fill up around 11:30 PM, and all the pump islands had cones or signs indicating they were closed. The two attendants who were there, when they saw us arrive, went into the small, container-like booth in front of the pumps, and when we approached in the car to ask if they were open, they closed the booth door in our faces and didn't come out. The station is open 24 hours, but the employees don't want to help you. The YPF across the street, with only one attendant, had all four islands full and was pumping gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnbmQtRXhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre muy serviciales los plateros. Cómo socio del ACA bastante seguido los elijo.

(Translated by Google)
The silversmiths are always very helpful. As an ACA member, I choose them quite often.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnOWQ3YzZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Le doy 1 estrella a la playa porque no existe menos. Siempre CERO ganas de atender, discuten entre ellos, hay que esperar que vengan de no sé dónde para que te atiendan.
Ni hablar si agarrás el cambio de turno= LA MUERTE esperando que te atiendan de favor.
Pareciera que trabajan a reglamento.
Como socio del ACA debieran revisar la gente que ponen.
Lamentable.

(Translated by Google)
I'm giving the beach service one star because there's no lower rating. They're always completely unwilling to help, they argue amongst themselves, and you have to wait for someone to come from who-knows-where before you get any service.
And don't even get me started on the shift change—it's a nightmare waiting for them to serve you as a favor.
It seems like they're just following the rules. As a member of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), they should review the staff they hire. It's a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnc3JIV0ZREAE
